1:
The sun has set on the former Dawnservant Gulool Ja Ja. Unfortunately, there is no time to remain idle─the people of Tuliyollal have need of their new leaders.

※In the event that you leave the area and wish to return, speak with the guard keep watch at the entrance to the Sunperch.
